k6.description: Grafana k6 MCP (k6 x mcp). Validates and runs scripts for smoke/heal. Requires k6 v2+ on PATH.

playwright.description: Optional Playwright MCP for interactive browser tools. Pipeline uses in-process Playwright+CDP by default.

chrome-devtools.description: Optional Chrome DevTools MCP for live network/perf traces. Not used as the capture layer.
